metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_1690
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 10. Quantitative immunoelectron microscopy of SNAP47 immunolabeling in glutamatergic neurons of the rat hippocampus shows labeling on mossy fiber boutons and postsynaptic spines of CA3 pyramidal cells. Labeling for SNAP47 was present in most presynaptic terminals, but at a level lower than that detected in postsynaptic compartments.

Fig 11. Ultrastructural localization of SNAP47 in axon terminals and dendrites of GABAergic INs of the mouse hippocampus gives similar result: expression in pre- and postsynaptic neurons

23/10/2017 Pim
- In Fig.8/9 the authors show that SNAP47; SNAP-47 is present both pre- and postsynaptically in the Mossy Fiber Projection System of the rat (using ZnT3 and PSD95 as resp. pre and postsynaptic markers). In the mouse, SNAP47; SNAP-47 is predominantly located at the postsynapse (clearly different from the rat species).. Experimental description: M&M: +ambiguous + "In order to identify the precise subcellular localization of SNAP47 protein in mouse and rat hippocampal neuron, we combined freeze substitution, low temperature embedding and postembedding immunogold labeling". In text with Fig 10: we next examined the MF projection in the rat hippocampus. In text with Fig 11: Ultrastructural localization of SNAP47 in axon terminals and dendrites of GABAergic INs of the mouse hippocampus
